title: Most Expensive Item That Can Not Be Bought

canonicalSolutions.code:
# Time:  O(1)
# Space: O(1)

# Chicken McNugget Theorem
class Solution(object):
    def mostExpensiveItem(self, primeOne, primeTwo):
        """
        :type primeOne: int
        :type primeTwo: int
        :rtype: int
        """
        # reference:
        # - https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Coin_problem
        # - https://mikebeneschan.medium.com/the-chicken-mcnugget-theorem-explained-2daca6fbbe1e
        return primeOne*primeTwo-primeOne-primeTwo


# Time:  O(p1 * p2)
# Space: O(p1 + p2)
# dp
class Solution2(object):
    def mostExpensiveItem(self, primeOne, primeTwo):
        """
        :type primeOne: int
        :type primeTwo: int
        :rtype: int
        """
        dp = [False]*max(primeOne, primeTwo)
        dp[0] = True
        result = 1
        for i in xrange(2, primeOne*primeTwo):
            dp[i%len(dp)] = dp[(i-primeOne)%len(dp)] or dp[(i-primeTwo)%len(dp)]
            if not dp[i%len(dp)]:
                result = i
        return result
